# Beslutskollen
> AI-powered summaries of municipal decisions in Örebro, Sweden

Beslutskollen automatically reads public meeting protocols (PDF) from Örebro municipality,
summarizes each decision using AI, analyzes voting patterns per party, and publishes
structured data as a free, searchable website and JSON API.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://lingabton.github.io/kommun-monitor/): All decisions searchable and filterable
- [Insikter](https://lingabton.github.io/kommun-monitor/insikter/): Automated political insights and power analysis
- [API docs](https://lingabton.github.io/kommun-monitor/api/v1/docs/): Full API documentation

## API (Free, No Authentication)

- [/api/v1/decisions.json](https://lingabton.github.io/kommun-monitor/api/v1/decisions.json): All decisions with voting data
- [/api/v1/parties.json](https://lingabton.github.io/kommun-monitor/api/v1/parties.json): Party statistics and alliances
- [/api/v1/insights.json](https://lingabton.github.io/kommun-monitor/api/v1/insights.json): Power analysis, unusual coalitions, trends

## Key Facts

- Municipality: Örebro kommun, Sweden (population 163,000)
- Governing coalition: S + M + C
- Bodies monitored: Kommunfullmäktige (municipal council) + Kommunstyrelsen (executive board)
- Mandate period covered: 2023-2026 (73 protocols, hundreds of decisions)
- Data source: Public protocols from orebro.se (offentlighetsprincipen / Swedish FOI law)
- Updated daily at 08:00 CET via automated pipeline
- License: CC BY 4.0 (AI summaries), public records (source data)

## Contact

Beslutskollen is an independent civic tech project. Not affiliated with Örebro kommun.
